executives.name: Alan Hair
executives.background: Former President and CEO of Hudbay Minerals Inc. Over 35 years of experience in the mining industry.

executives.name: David Garofalo
executives.background: Mr. Garofalo has served as our Chairman, President and Chief Executive Officer since August 2020. He has over 30 years of experience in the metals and mining industry. Previously, he served as President and Chief Executive Officer of Goldcorp Inc. from 2016 to 2019 and as President and Chief Executive Officer of Hudbay Minerals Inc. from 2010 to 2016.

executives.name: Igor Gonzales
executives.background: Mr. Gonzales was formerly the COO of Buenaventura and Barrick Gold. He has over 35 years of experience in the mining industry.

executives.name: Peter Kukielski
executives.background: Mr. Kukielski was appointed President and Chief Executive Officer of Hudbay in 2019. He has more than 30 years of experience in the mining industry. Previously, he was Executive Chairman of Waratah Resources Limited and President and CEO of Nevsun Resources Ltd. He also served as Chief Executive of ArcelorMittal Mining and held executive positions at Teck Resources and Falconbridge.

executives.name: Stephen Lang
executives.background: Mr. Lang is the Chair of the Board. He was formerly the President and CEO of Centerra Gold Inc. and has over 40 years of experience in the mining industry, including executive roles at Stillwater Mining Company and Barrick Gold.

tenure_dates.title: Chair of the Board of Directors

executives.name: Cashel Meagher
executives.background: Mr. Meagher has over 25 years of experience in the mining industry. He previously served as Senior Vice President and Chief Operating Officer of Hudbay Minerals Inc.

tenure_dates.title: Senior Vice President and Chief Operating Officer

executives.name: Eugene Lei
executives.background: Mr. Lei was appointed Chief Financial Officer in 2022. He joined Hudbay in 2012 and has held progressively senior roles in corporate development and strategy. Prior to Hudbay, he was an investment banker at a major Canadian bank.

executives.name: Patrick Donnelly
executives.background: Mr. Donnelly was appointed Senior Vice President, Legal and Organizational Effectiveness in 2022. He joined Hudbay in 2008 and has served as General Counsel since 2011.

board_of_directors.background: Former President and CEO of Hudbay Minerals Inc. Over 35 years of experience in the mining industry.

tenure_dates.title: Chair of the Board of Directors

board_of_directors.name: Carol Banducci
board_of_directors.background: Ms. Banducci was formerly the EVP and CFO of IAMGOLD Corporation. She has extensive experience in financial management and corporate strategy in the mining and manufacturing sectors.

board_of_directors.name: Jacqueline Allison
board_of_directors.background: Dr. Allison has over 20 years of experience in the mining industry as a research analyst and investment manager.

tenure_dates.title: Director, Investor Relations
tenure_dates.end_date: Prior to Dominion Diamond Corporation role
